task_completion.description: CoppeliaSim is opened to develop the robot trajectory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim application GUI is visible on the screen, showing a 3D scene with a robot.

task_completion.description: A script is developed to control the robot using inverse kinematics and define waypoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor or CoppeliaSim script window is open, showing code that calculates inverse kinematics, defines a linear path, or sets up waypoints.

task_completion.description: The robot executes the trajectory in the simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The simulation is running, and the robot arm is seen in different positions across screenshots, indicating it is following a path.

task_completion.description: The per-waypoint records are exported to weld_trajectory.csv with at least 8 waypoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or text editor shows the file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/weld_trajectory.csv containing tabular data with at least 8 rows of waypoint coordinates/positions.

task_completion.description: The trajectory summary statistics are exported to weld_stats.json.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or text editor shows the file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/weld_stats.json containing JSON formatted summary statistics (e.g., path span, number of waypoints).

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with CoppeliaSim to generate the trajectory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim GUI is actively used and the simulation is run, rather than the agent just writing a standalone Python script that mocks the output files without running a physics/kinematics simulation.

integrity.description: The CSV and JSON files were generated programmatically by the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code contains file writing logic for the CSV and JSON files, and there is no evidence of the agent manually typing the data into a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the final output files manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen manually typing JSON or CSV data into a text editor; the files appear as a result of running the simulation script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 8 or more waypoints and a minimum path span of 0.2m. The output files must be located exactly at /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/weld_trajectory.csv and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/weld_stats.json.
